parts.description:
A container for the content of the scroll area.
Renders a `<div>` element.

A small rectangular area that appears at the intersection of horizontal and vertical scrollbars.
Renders a `<div>` element.

Groups all parts of the scroll area.
Renders a `<div>` element.

inputs.name: dir
inputs.description: Text direction of the scroll area. Affects horizontal (RTL) scroll math.

inputs.name: overflowEdgeThreshold
inputs.description:
The threshold in pixels that must be passed before the overflow edge attributes are applied.
Accepts a single number for all edges or an object to configure them individually.

parts.description:
A vertical or horizontal scrollbar for the scroll area.
Renders a `<div>` element.

inputs.name: keepMounted
inputs.description: Whether to keep the element rendered when the viewport isn't scrollable.

inputs.name: orientation
inputs.description: Whether the scrollbar controls vertical or horizontal scroll.

parts.description:
The draggable part of the scrollbar that indicates the current scroll position.
Renders a `<div>` element.

The actual scrollable container of the scroll area.
Renders a `<div>` element.
